title: Successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User is registered with username 'john' and password 'demo'. User is on the login page.
steps: Verify the page redirects to the dashboard
expected_result: User successfully logs in and is redirected to the dashboard. The Account Services menu replaces the Customer Login panel.

title: Login fails with invalid password
preconditions: User is registered with username 'john'. User is on the login page.
steps: Observe the error message displayed in the main content area
expected_result: Error message 'The username and password could not be verified.' is displayed. User remains on the login page. Username field retains 'john', password field is cleared.

title: Login with empty username field
preconditions: User is on the login page.
expected_result: Validation error 'Please enter a username and password.' is displayed. User remains on the login page.

title: Successful registration with valid data
preconditions: User is on the registration page. No account exists with username 'newuser1'.
steps: Navigate to the registration page by clicking 'Register' link
Enter 'John' in the First Name field
Enter 'Doe' in the Last Name field
Enter '123 Main St' in the Address field
Enter 'New York' in the City field
Enter '10001' in the Zip Code field
expected_result: Welcome message 'Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in.' is displayed with username 'newuser1'. Account Services menu replaces the Customer Login panel.

title: Registration with mismatched passwords
preconditions: User is on the registration page.
steps: Fill in all registration fields with valid data
expected_result: Error message 'Passwords did not match.' is displayed next to the Confirm field. Registration is not completed.
